name: emotional-blackmail
description: Dr. Susan Forward's classic 'Emotional Blackmail: When the People in Your Life Use Fear, Obligation, and Guilt to Manipulate You' — a practical toolkit for recognizing emotional blackmail (the FOG), understanding the four faces of blackmailers, identifying your hot buttons, and learning non-defensive communication techniques to break free from manipulation.
useCase: Recognizing when you're being emotionally blackmailed, understanding the FOG (Fear, Obligation, Guilt), identifying the four blackmailer types, setting healthy boundaries, and learning to respond instead of react.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for professional therapy in abusive relationships
Some techniques require practice and may feel uncomfortable at first
Applying these techniques may cause tension or relationship rupture
Self-diagnosis of others as 'blackmailers' can be misused
